title: Create a WebUserDirectChat component in the sui-media pac...
progress_log: [2026-03-07T16:56:54.466170+00:00] Project created; PRD written to prd.md; phases extracted

work_items.acceptance_criteria: Form renders with name, email, and message inputs. Header text matches exactly. Component accepts provider prop. Unit tests confirm presence in DOM.
work_items.implementation_details: Create the basic React component with name, email, and message fields using React and TypeScript. Implement a form with the required header: 'In order for us to put you in touch with our team we need:'. Component should accept a 'provider' prop defaulting to 'whats-app'.
work_items.title: WebUserDirectChat Scaffold

work_items.acceptance_criteria: Validation errors shown for empty fields or malformed emails. Submit button is disabled or triggers validation before API call.
work_items.implementation_details: Implement validation for required fields and email format using standard regex and non-empty string checks. Prevent submission if validation fails.
work_items.title: Client-side Validation

work_items.acceptance_criteria: API accepts valid POST requests and returns 400 for missing or invalid data. Integration tests validate the request schema.
work_items.implementation_details: Create a backend endpoint at /api/chat/send that receives POST data { name, email, message, provider } and performs basic schema validation.
work_items.title: Next.js API Route

work_items.acceptance_criteria: Messages are forwarded to WhatsApp Business API successfully. Backend handles provider errors gracefully without crashing.
work_items.implementation_details: Integrate with the WhatsApp Business API using environment variables for credentials. Implement error handling for timeouts and authentication failures.
work_items.title: WhatsApp Provider Implementation

work_items.acceptance_criteria: Submitting the form sends data to the API. Loading state is visible while the request is in flight.
work_items.implementation_details: Connect the React component to the /api/chat/send endpoint using fetch. Implement a loading state during the network request.
work_items.title: Form Submission Hook

work_items.acceptance_criteria: Success message displayed on 200 OK. Error message displayed on API failure.
work_items.implementation_details: Update the UI based on the API response to show either a success message or an error message to the user.
work_items.title: Submission Feedback

work_items.acceptance_criteria: Component matches design system patterns and is responsive. pnpm run build completes without errors.
work_items.implementation_details: Apply CSS/SCSS or styled-components following stoked-ui design patterns. Ensure the component is fully responsive for mobile and desktop.
work_items.title: Styling & Responsiveness

work_items.acceptance_criteria: Component is accessible via package export. README contains clear usage instructions and API documentation.
work_items.implementation_details: Export the component from the sui-media package index and add README documentation including prop definitions and usage examples.
work_items.title: Export & Documentation
